fixtures.description: A proposition is renamed while denotation and inferential role are explicitly preserved.
One coarse category splits into two versioned categories with declared commitment migration and unresolved legacy cases.
A rule changes admissibility conditions while prior conclusions and dependency history remain version-indexed.
An unchanged label is treated as unchanged meaning despite altered denotation and downstream inferences.
A new interpretation overwrites the old semantic state and erases why earlier commitments were licensed.
Cross-version equivalence is available only through an undeclared external semantic oracle.
A global reinterpretation changes unbounded prior commitments without a finite recoverable dependency account.
